artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a sealed wooden suggestion box on a thin pedestal in a beige corridor, its slot crammed with folded blank slips, a thick film of dust on its lid that has never been lifted, cold cyan light glinting off its brass hinges, a faint arcane glow leaking from the seam, melancholic and forgotten, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Suggestion Box
text: {2}, {T}: Each opponent may make a suggestion. Ignore it. You gain 2 life. (Your input is valued. It is not, however, read.)
flavorText: Twelve years of suggestions. The lid has never once been lifted.
